name: NewsNow MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for NewsNow — a Chinese news aggregation platform that collects trending headlines from major Chinese and international sources (Weibo hot search, Zhihu trending, Baidu hot, tech news, etc.). Enables AI agents to query current trending news topics across multiple Chinese news platforms.
use_cases: Querying trending Chinese news and hot search topics from aggregated sources
Monitoring Weibo, Zhihu, and Baidu trending topics for market research agents
Fetching tech and business news from Chinese platforms for analysis agents
Building news monitoring workflows that include Chinese social media trending content
not_for: Deep article content — focuses on trending topics and headlines
Teams requiring data residency outside China for compliance
best_when: A researcher, marketer, or developer needs to monitor Chinese social media trends and news headlines — Weibo hot search, Zhihu hot questions, tech platform trending topics — via AI agents.
avoid_when: You need English-language news primarily or deep article content. Also: Chinese news data residency concerns for regulated industries.

auth.notes: NewsNow is self-hostable and can be accessed publicly. Optional authentication for private instances.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — NewsNow is open source self-hosted
pricing.notes: NewsNow is free open source. Requires self-hosting or using a public NewsNow instance. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Depends on self-hosted instance and upstream source rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Requires a running NewsNow instance — self-hosted setup needed before use
Data is primarily Chinese-language — agents must handle Chinese text appropriately
Upstream source availability affects data freshness — Chinese platforms change APIs frequently
Content is trending/hot topics — not full article text
agent_readiness.security_notes: Chinese news data — review for CN data residency compliance. Self-hosted option keeps data local.

security_score_components.security_notes: Chinese source data. Self-hostable for data control. No sensitive data beyond news topics.
